items.summary: Update backend getRequestedTrips function to filter trips for driver's Available Trips section using ALL 7 criteria: (1) trip.status == "requested", (2) driver.isAvailable == true, (3) if driver.isVerified field exists then require driver.isVerified == true otherwise skip this check, (4) driver is NOT currently on an active trip (no trips assigned to driver with status in: "accepted", "driver_arriving", "arrived", "on_trip"), (5) trip.pickupPincode == driver.servicePincode, (6) trip.vehicleType is included in driver.vehicleExperience array, (7) trip.transmissionType is included in driver.transmissionComfort array

Implement smart ordering logic in backend getRequestedTrips function: trips where trip.pickupAreaName contains driver.serviceAreaName (case-insensitive substring match) should appear FIRST, followed by other same-pincode trips that passed all filtering criteria

Update frontend AvailableTripsSection component to display filtered and ordered trips from backend without any additional client-side filtering, maintaining existing UI layout and trip card display format
